prompt: How has the average grade changed over academic years?

inputData.question: How has the average grade changed over academic years?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How has the average grade changed over academic years?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How has the average grade changed over academic years?"},"startedAt":1771855806447,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see how average grades have changed over academic years. I've confirmed the schema structure: grades table contains exam_score, project_score, and attendance_score; enrollments links to course_sections which contains academic_year. The query groups grades by academic_year and calculates averages for each component score, ordered chronologically. This provides a clear trend view of grade changes across years.","sql":"
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.project_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.attendance_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  COUNT(g.id) AS total_grades
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
","assumptions":["Grades are composed of three components: exam_score, project_score, and attendance_score","Academic year is the primary time dimension for grouping","A grade record is included if it has at least one non-null score component"]},"endedAt":1771855826146},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Average Grade Components by Academic Year
visualization.description: Trend of average exam, project, and attendance scores across academic years

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.project_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.attendance_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  COUNT(g.id) AS total_grades
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC

result.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.academic_year,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.project_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_project_score,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(g.attendance_score AS NUMERIC)), 2) AS avg_attendance_score,
  COUNT(g.id) AS total_grades
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL 
   OR g.attendance_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cs.academic_year
ORDER BY cs.academic_year ASC
